message:
feat(overprompting): add scoped styles and content registry entry

Integrate the overprompting article into the site's style system and
content registry for proper discovery and navigation.

Scoped CSS (app/globals.css, +320 lines):
All styles scoped under .overprompting-scope with op- prefix to prevent
leakage to other pages. Follows the same pattern as .raptorq-scope.

CSS custom properties:
- --op-bg, --op-text, --op-muted for base colors
- --op-amber, --op-orange, --op-rose for accent palette

Typography classes:
- .op-display-title: Fluid sizing clamp(3rem, 10vw, 7.5rem), -0.06em tracking
- .op-section-title: With amber bar pseudo-element
- .op-drop-cap::first-letter: 4.5rem amber drop cap

Component styles:
- .op-callout: Blockquote with amber border and gradient background
- .op-viz-container: Glass-morphism card with backdrop-filter
- .op-viz-header, .op-viz-content: Visualization wrapper structure
- .op-phase-btn: Toggle buttons for PlanExecuteViz
- .op-insight-card: Insight cards with hover glow effect

Animation classes:
- .op-progress-bar: Scroll progress indicator
- .op-fade-in-up: Section reveal animation
- @keyframes opFadeInUp: translateY(20px) to 0 with opacity

Responsive adjustments:
- Mobile-first with breakpoint overrides
- Reduced spacing and font sizes on smaller screens

Content registry (lib/content.ts):
- Added to writingHighlights array at top position
- featured: true for homepage visibility
- gradient: "from-amber-500/20 via-orange-500/20 to-rose-500/20"
- Category: "AI & Prompting"
- Date: 2026-02-12

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

     title: "RaptorQ: The Black Magic of Liquid Data",
     href: "/writing/raptorq",
